notes.sg-atmospheric-science-atmospheric-chemi: Relabeled to 'atmospheric composition' for broader scope. Sample titles suggest it covers more than just chemistry.
notes.sg-atmospheric-science-biomass-burning: Relabeled to 'biomass burning emissions' to be more specific.
notes.sg-atmospheric-science-emission-inventor: Relabeled to 'emissions inventory' for more natural phrasing.
notes.sg-atmospheric-science-air-quality: Relabeled to 'air quality and pollution' to encompass both aspects.
notes.sg-atmospheric-science-air-pollution: Merged into 'air quality and pollution' as it's a near-duplicate and the relabeled version is more comprehensive.
notes.sg-atmospheric-science-atmospheric-metha: Relabeled to 'atmospheric methane and greenhouse gases' to include related concepts.
notes.sg-atmospheric-science-atmospheric-circu: Relabeled to 'atmospheric dynamics' for a more standard term.
notes.sg-atmospheric-science-chemical-transpor: Relabeled to 'atmospheric chemical transport models' for clarity and pluralization.
